creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Mon May 19 08:13:42 2014
New Revision: 354514
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354514
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354514/

Log:
  - Update to 0.101343
  - Add LICENSE (Artistic 1 & GPL 1)
  - Pet portlint(1)
  
  PR:		ports/189186
  Submitted by:	Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/distinfo
  head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/Makefile	Mon May 19 08:09:20 2014	(r354513)
+++ head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/Makefile	Mon May 19 08:13:42 2014	(r354514)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	MooseX-Types-Perl
-PORTVERSION=	0.101341
+PORTVERSION=	0.101343
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -10,6 +10,9 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	gslin@gslin.org
 COMMENT=	Moose types that check against Perl syntax
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-MooseX-Types>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-MooseX-Types \
 		p5-Params-Util>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Params-Util
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}

Modified: head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/distinfo	Mon May 19 08:09:20 2014	(r354513)
+++ head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/distinfo	Mon May 19 08:13:42 2014	(r354514)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (MooseX-Types-Perl-0.101341.tar.gz) = d1081a734d62121f3262b18170022de2f51ebcc0a8b8afe1b1273d7cb3e58c97
-SIZE (MooseX-Types-Perl-0.101341.tar.gz) = 11482
+SHA256 (MooseX-Types-Perl-0.101343.tar.gz) = f084beaf3c33209c68d05d4dbc24c25d604a6458b9738d96dceb086c8ef1325a
+SIZE (MooseX-Types-Perl-0.101343.tar.gz) = 14353

Modified: head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/pkg-descr	Mon May 19 08:09:20 2014	(r354513)
+++ head/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/pkg-descr	Mon May 19 08:13:42 2014	(r354514)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 This library provides Moose types for checking things (mostly strings)
 against syntax that is, or is a reasonable subset of, Perl syntax.
 
-WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/MooseX-Types-Perl/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/MooseX-Types-Perl/
